str_content:
CASE REFERENCE 
STR-2026-04-04-9627

REPORTING ENTITY 
Union Bank of India, AML Compliance Division

SUBJECT ACCOUNTS 
The following accounts are involved in the suspicious transactions:
- ACC05200000000035, Manoj Tiwari, suspicious total: ₹182,840.23
- ACC05200000000001, Meena Iyer, suspicious total: ₹178,385.35
- ACC05200000000037, Rekha Pandey 4, suspicious total: ₹173,760.17
- ACC05200000000021, Arun Bose, suspicious total: ₹169,420.06
- ACC05200000000007, Hema Malhotra, suspicious total: ₹165,772.70
- ACC05200000000009, Lalita Chatterjee, suspicious total: ₹161,905.41

FRAUD PATTERN IDENTIFIED 
Round-Trip Fraud / Circular Layering: The transactions indicate a circular flow of funds between the subject accounts, suggesting possible round-tripping and layering behavior to obscure the origin of the funds.

TRANSACTION TIMELINE 
• 2025-09-01 20:14:00: ACC05200000000035 (Manoj Tiwari) to ACC05200000000001 (Meena Iyer), ₹182,840.23, NEFT
• 2025-09-01 20:23:00: ACC05200000000001 (Meena Iyer) to ACC05200000000037 (Rekha Pandey 4), ₹178,385.35, IMPS
• 2025-09-01 20:33:00: ACC05200000000037 (Rekha Pandey 4) to ACC05200000000021 (Arun Bose), ₹173,760.17, RTGS
• 2025-09-01 20:39:00: ACC05200000000021 (Arun Bose) to ACC05200000000007 (Hema Malhotra), ₹169,420.06, NEFT
• 2025-09-01 20:49:00: ACC05200000000007 (Hema Malhotra) to ACC05200000000009 (Lalita Chatterjee), ₹165,772.70, NEFT
• 2025-09-01 20:57:00: ACC05200000000009 (Lalita Chatterjee) to ACC05200000000035 (Manoj Tiwari), ₹161,905.41, RTGS

REGULATORY BASIS 
This report is filed under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA) 2002, specifically sections 3 and 12, and the Reserve Bank of India's (RBI) Anti-Money Laundering (AML) Master Circular, clauses 4.1 and 4.2.

RECOMMENDED ACTION 
Account Freeze: Immediately freeze the subject accounts to prevent further suspicious transactions.
FIU-IND goAML: Report the suspicious transactions to the Financial Intelligence Unit - India (FIU-IND) through the goAML portal.
Refer to ED: Refer the case to the Enforcement Directorate (ED) for further investigation.
Enhanced Monitoring: Continuously monitor the subject accounts and related transactions for any further suspicious activity.

RISK RATING 
HIGH: The transactions exhibit a high risk of money laundering due to the circular flow of funds and layering behavior.

INVESTIGATING OFFICER 
[To be assigned]

REPORT GENERATED
